source_jobs.title: Abogado Corporativo (Jr)
source_jobs.description:
OUR JOB IS TO REVOLUTIONIZE THE STRATEGIC COMMUNICATION 

We are another.co, a global communications agency founded in 2004. we have been transforming the way things are done. Revolution is in our DNA, and it guides every project we undertake.

Our mission is clear: to create inspirational, powerful, and creative storytelling that is always culturally relevant, leveraging the integration of our expert teams who can work across any channel, anywhere.

Our vision is ambitious: we believe the right stories have the power to change everything. Every campaign, piece of content, and idea that comes from another aims to make a real impact.

If you want to join a place where creativity has no limits and impact is real, this is your space.

Why Join Us? 
This is your chance to be part of the another Community, an innovative and multicultural team that’s redefining the rules of communication. If you're passionate about strategy, creativity, and results, this is the place for you.

WE ARE HIRING:




Legal Assistant
 
✅ Requirements
* Bachelor’s degree in Law.
* Knowledge of corporate law, intellectual property (copyright, trademarks, and related procedures), regulatory compliance, and contracts.
* 1 to 2 years of experience in corporate legal areas, law firms, or legal departments.
* Experience in IP processes such as registration of artistic works, trademarks, rights reservation, licensing documentation, or follow-up with intellectual property authorities.
* Experience in contract review, document management, or legal administrative support.
* Intermediate–advanced English (for document review and communication with clients or international partners).
 
🎯 Activities
* Draft, review, and update service agreements, NDAs, influencer/talent contracts, and vendor agreements.
* Track signatures, expirations, renewals, and document safekeeping.
* Organize and maintain the digital and physical legal archive.
* Prepare legal reports, databases, and internal control documentation.
* Coordinate the collection of documents with other areas (Finance, HR, Accounts, Production, etc.).
* Support data protection processes and compliance with internal policies.
* Ensure campaigns, activations, and collaborations comply with applicable regulations.
*Provide basic legal support to account and project teams.
* Manage communications with external law firms when needed.
* Coordinate registration processes, follow-ups, or clarifications with authorities or corresponding entities.
* Maintain control of permits, licenses, or authorizations required for campaigns.
* Support Intellectual Property–related activities, including: preparation and submission of trademark or copyright applications, follow-up on rights reservation, review of licensing or assignment documents, and managing inquiries before IP authorities.
 
🌟 Skills
* Proactivity
* Teamwork
* Effective communication
* Problem-solving
* Service-oriented mindset
* Client focus (in English)

source_jobs.title: Account Executive (PR & IM) (Project)
source_jobs.description:
OUR JOB IS TO REVOLUTIONIZE THE STRATEGIC COMMUNICATION 

Join Our Consultant Program!  

We are another.co, founded in 2004. We are a communication agency dedicated to developing comprehensive strategies for our clients. We are currently looking talent as Consultants to collaborate on exciting and diverse projects within our areas of expertise. We value the ability to build solid relationships with the media, creativity in brand positioning, the capacity to generate persuasive content and the ability to manage our clients' reputation effectively. That's why we are excited to work with professionals who bring their expertise to our projects as Consultants.  

Tell us about your experience, and you could become part of the talent pool we have at the agency.  

You need: 
- Demonstrable experience in the role.  
- Portfolio showcasing previous work and relevant skills.  
- Excellent written/visual/audiovisual communication skills.  
- Ability to work autonomously and as part of a team.  
- Availability to meet deadlines.  
- Ability to invoice for services rendered.  

If you are interested in joining our team as a Consultant, please leave your contact information in this space.  

NOW WE ARE LOOKING FOR 


Account Executive (PR & IM) (Project)

Requirements
3+ years of experience in a public relations agency, managing accounts.
English proficiency ( B2 - C1 ) -Must.
Degree in Communication, Public Relations, Marketing, Journalism or a related field.
Knowledge in PR strategies 360º.
Knowledge in IM strategies
Media management.
Planning and execution of events.

Activities
Develop, coordinate and execute public relations proposals for the assigned brand.
Plan, develop and coordinate projects and the events derived from them.
Attend and respond to customers effectively.
Prepare budgets and maintain control of them.
Prepare presentations for the client (progress, reports, results).
Strengthen relationships with the various media.
Conduct negotiations with suppliers.

Skills
Proactivity
Teamwork
Good Communication
Good spelling and writing
Experience in customer service, service oriented and problem solving

source_jobs.description:

This is your chance to be part of the another Community, an innovative and multicultural team that’s redefining the rules of communication. If you're passionate about strategy, creativity, and results, this is the place for you.

WE ARE HIRING:




Account PR & IM Executive (Consumer)
 
Requirements
 
+ 3 years of experience in a public relations agency, managing consumer accounts.
- Proficiency in English.
- Knowledge of 360º public relations and influencer marketing strategies.
- Experience managing media and influencer relations for consumer brands.
- Degree in Communication, Public Relations, Marketing, Journalism or a related field.
 
 
 
Activities
 
- Develop, coordinate, and execute public relations and influencer marketing proposals for the assigned brand.
- Effectively attend to and respond to client needs.
- Create press releases and media invitations.
- Prepare client presentations (progress updates, reports, results).
- Strengthen relationships with various media outlets.
- Review and oversee influencer marketing campaigns.
- Develop creative ideas to enhance client positioning through PR and influencer marketing strategies.
 
 
Skills
Proactive
Teamwork
Communication
Good spelling and writing
Experience in customer service, service oriented and problem solving

source_jobs.title: Analista Contable
source_jobs.description:

This is your chance to be part of the another Community, an innovative and multicultural team that’s redefining the rules of communication. If you're passionate about strategy, creativity, and results, this is the place for you.

WE ARE HIRING:




Analista Contable
 
Requisitos
-Más de 2 años de experiencia en Contabilidad y Fiscal.
-Licenciatura en Contaduría.
-Experiencia en temas fiscales (pagos provisionales y declaraciones anuales).
 
Actividades
-Supervisar y conciliar los diferentes módulos del sistema contable.
-Preparar pagos provisionales y declaraciones anuales de diversos regímenes fiscales.
-Control de CFDI’s.
-Elaboración de estados financieros.
-Registro de pólizas.
-Integración de cuentas.
 
Habilidades
-Proactividad.
-Trabajo en equipo.
-Buena comunicación.
-Excelente ortografía y redacción.
-Experiencia en atención al cliente, orientación al servicio y resolución de problemas.

source_jobs.title: Analista de Facturación y Cobranza (Jr)
source_jobs.description:
NUESTRO TRABAJO ES REVOLUCIONAR LA COMUNICACIÓN ESTRATÉGICA 
 
Another es una agencia global creada en 2004.  Tenemos presencia internacional en países como: Colombia, Chile, Argentina, Perú, Panamá, Brasil, Estados Unidos, México.
 
¿Por qué trabajar con nosotros?
Es una fantástica oportunidad para unirte a la familia Another y formar parte de un equipo innovador que rompe esquemas en comunicación.
 
Estamos buscando un:
Analista de Facturación y Cobranza (Jr)
 
Requisitos+1 a 2 años de experiencia en facturación y/o cuentas por cobrar.
Licenciatura en Contaduría, Administración o áreas económico-financieras.
Conocimiento en facturación electrónica (CFDI 4.0).
Experiencia en gestión de cobranza y seguimiento a clientes.
✔ Interés en desarrollarse en el área contable/financiera
ActividadesEmisión de facturas conforme a solicitudes internas y lineamientos fiscales (CFDI 4.0).
Validación de datos fiscales (RFC, razón social, régimen fiscal, código postal).
Control y seguimiento de facturas emitidas.
Seguimiento a cuentas por cobrar y gestión de pagos.
Contacto con clientes para asegurar la cobranza oportuna.
Identificación y gestión de facturas vencidas.
Elaboración de reportes de antigüedad de saldos (aging).
Conciliación de ingresos vs facturación.
Habilidades
Organización y atención al detalle
Comunicación efectiva
Seguimiento y control de procesos
Conocimientos básicos fiscales
Facturación electrónica (CFDI 4.0)
Excel intermedio (filtros, tablas dinámicas, cruces)
 
En Another Group respetamos y celebramos la diversidad. Como parte de nuestro compromiso de promover un lugar y un entorno de trabajo diversos e inclusivos, todo nuestro personal tiene la oportunidad de desarrollarse y alcanzar su potencial, independientemente de su religión, raza, orientación sexual, identidad y expresión de género, nacionalidad o cualquier otra diferencia o condición.
 
¿Estás preparado para Another experience?
¡Únete a nosotros AHORA!
¡PRESENTA TU SOLICITUD!

source_jobs.title: Commercial Executive (Influencer Marketing)
source_jobs.description:
OUR JOB IS TO REVOLUTIONIZE THE STRATEGIC COMMUNICATION 

We are another.co, a global communications agency founded in 2004. we have been transforming the way things are done. Revolution is in our DNA, and it guides every project we undertake.

Our mission is clear: to create inspirational, powerful, and creative storytelling that is always culturally relevant, leveraging the integration of our expert teams who can work across any channel, anywhere.

Our vision is ambitious: we believe the right stories have the power to change everything. Every campaign, piece of content, and idea that comes from another aims to make a real impact.

If you want to join a place where creativity has no limits and impact is real, this is your space.

Why Join Us? 
This is your chance to be part of the another Community, an innovative and multicultural team that’s redefining the rules of communication. If you're passionate about strategy, creativity, and results, this is the place for you.

WE ARE HIRING:




Commercial Executive (Influencer Marketing)

 Which are the requirements ?
Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, Advertising, Public Relations, Business Administration, or a related field.
Minimum of 2 years of experience in commercial roles, sales, Influencer Marketing, advertising, media, or Talent Management.
Previous experience in sales, business development, or client acquisition—even outside the influencer marketing industry—will be highly valued.
Strong experience in commercial negotiations and closing business deals.
Knowledge of the influencer marketing, content creator, entertainment, and digital marketing industries.
Ability to manage multiple campaigns simultaneously.
Excellent relationship-building and client management skills.
Ability to work toward sales targets and commercial KPIs.
Intermediate to advanced English proficiency.
Excellent verbal and written communication skills.

 Which will be your responsibilities?
Prospect and develop new business opportunities for RAW Talent's talent portfolio.
This role does not involve direct talent management responsibilities.
We are looking for a commercially driven profile with a genuine passion for business development, sales, and building long-term client relationships.
Build and maintain strategic relationships with brands, agencies, advertisers, and potential clients.
Identify opportunities for brand collaborations, influencer campaigns, sponsorships, events, and strategic partnerships.
Develop commercial proposals aligned with brand objectives and each talent's profile.
Lead commercial negotiations and manage the sales process through closing.
Collaborate with the Talent Management and Operations teams to ensure the successful execution of commercial agreements.
Manage existing client relationships to identify growth opportunities and generate repeat business.
Monitor the status of contracts, approvals, payments, and campaign-related documentation, coordinating with internal teams as needed.
Stay up to date with market trends, the creator economy, and influencer marketing industry developments.
Maintain accurate and up-to-date commercial records, including pipeline management and sales forecasting.
Achieve the sales and revenue targets established for the department.
Keep campaign information, timelines, deliverables, and internal tracking tools updated to ensure operational excellence.

Skills
Business Development
Commercial Negotiation
Client Relationship Management
Prospecting & Lead Generation
Strategic Thinking
Organization & Prioritization
Results-Oriented Mindset
Proactive Communication
Problem Solving
Influencer Marketing

source_jobs.title: Content Governance Assistant (Beauty)
source_jobs.description:
OUR JOB IS TO REVOLUTIONIZE THE STRATEGIC COMMUNICATION 

We are another.co, a global communications agency founded in 2004. we have been transforming the way things are done. Revolution is in our DNA, and it guides every project we undertake.

This is your chance to be part of the another Community, an innovative and multicultural team that’s redefining the rules of communication. If you're passionate about strategy, creativity, and results, this is the place for you.

WE ARE HIRING:




Content Governance Assistant (Beauty)

Requirements
Background in Communication, Information Science, Marketing, Content Management, or a related field.
Previous experience (preferred) in digital content management, documentation, or editorial compliance/QA roles.
Basic knowledge of content management systems (CMS), metadata tagging, and publishing workflows.
Ability to work with collaborative tools (Google Workspace, Notion, Airtable, etc.).
Intermediate to advanced level of English (especially if working with bilingual or international content).

Activities
Responsible for properly documenting and archiving every action performed by influencers (post, reel, story), ensuring traceability, legal compliance, and alignment with brand guidelines.
Support the implementation and monitoring of policies, standards, and processes related to content creation, management, and publishing within the organization.
Ensure all materials comply with brand guidelines, regulatory standards, and strategic content objectives.

 
Skills
Attention to detail
Clear communication
Structured thinking
Cross-functional collaboration
Time management
Adaptability

source_jobs.title: Digital Social Media Specialist
source_jobs.description:
OUR JOB IS TO REVOLUTIONIZE THE STRATEGIC COMMUNICATION 

We are another.co, a global communications agency founded in 2004. we have been transforming the way things are done. Revolution is in our DNA, and it guides every project we undertake.

Our mission is clear: to create inspirational, powerful, and creative storytelling that is always culturally relevant, leveraging the integration of our expert teams who can work across any channel, anywhere.

Our vision is ambitious: we believe the right stories have the power to change everything. Every campaign, piece of content, and idea that comes from another aims to make a real impact.

If you want to join a place where creativity has no limits and impact is real, this is your space.

Why Join Us? 
This is your chance to be part of the another Community, an innovative and multicultural team that’s redefining the rules of communication. If you're passionate about strategy, creativity, and results, this is the place for you.

WE ARE HIRING:




Digital Social Media Specialist
Role Objective
Lead the Social Media and Influencer strategy to strengthen brand relevance, drive conversation and engagement, and contribute to business objectives across the funnel.
Qualifications
Ability to define and lead the Social Media strategy (organic and paid) aligned with the marketing plan and commercial calendar.
Ability to coordinate creative briefs and content guidelines, ensuring consistency in brand tone and messaging.
Experience overseeing the creation and publishing of social media content (posts, stories, reels, lives, UGC).
Ability to manage budgets allocated to Social Media and Influencers, ensuring efficiency and ROI.
Conversational English.
Basic knowledge of influencer marketing.
Basic knowledge of Social Listening.
Basic understanding and analysis of KPIs: reach, engagement, views, traffic, and conversions.
Responsibilities
Define and lead the Social Media strategy (organic and paid) aligned with the marketing plan and commercial calendar.
Develop the Influencers & Creators strategy (always-on and tactical campaigns).
Identify, evaluate, and manage relationships with influencers, content creators, and brand ambassadors.
Coordinate creative briefs and content guidelines, ensuring consistency in brand tone and messaging.
Oversee the creation and publishing of social media content (posts, stories, reels, lives, UGC).
Coordinate campaigns with agencies, platforms, and internal teams (Brand, PR, eCommerce).
Monitor brand and competitor conversations through Social Listening.
Analyze results and optimize performance based on KPIs: reach, engagement, views, traffic, and conversions.
Manage budgets allocated to Social Media and Influencers, ensuring efficiency and ROI.
Identify cultural trends, emerging formats, and innovation opportunities across social platforms.

Responsable

We are another.co, founded in 2004. We are a communication agency dedicated to developing comprehensive strategies for our clients. We are currently looking talent as Consultants to collaborate on exciting and diverse projects within our areas of expertise. We value the ability to build solid relationships with the media, creativity in brand positioning, the capacity to generate persuasive content and the ability to manage our clients' reputation effectively. That's why we are excited to work with professionals who bring their expertise to our projects as Consultants.

source_jobs.title: Paid Media Specialist
source_jobs.description:
OUR JOB IS TO REVOLUTIONIZE THE STRATEGIC COMMUNICATION 

We are another.co, a global communications agency founded in 2004. we have been transforming the way things are done. Revolution is in our DNA, and it guides every project we undertake.

Our mission is clear: to create inspirational, powerful, and creative storytelling that is always culturally relevant, leveraging the integration of our expert teams who can work across any channel, anywhere.

Our vision is ambitious: we believe the right stories have the power to change everything. Every campaign, piece of content, and idea that comes from another aims to make a real impact.

If you want to join a place where creativity has no limits and impact is real, this is your space.

Why Join Us? 
This is your chance to be part of the another Community, an innovative and multicultural team that’s redefining the rules of communication. If you're passionate about strategy, creativity, and results, this is the place for you.

WE ARE HIRING:




Paid Media Specialist

Requerimientos
2–4 años de experiencia en campañas PPC
Experiencia en agencia (deseable)
Conocimiento en paid media (Google Ads y Meta Ads mínimo)
Manejo de métricas de performance (CPA, ROAS, CTR, etc.)
Conocimiento en tracking y conversiones
Entendimiento de funnels de conversión
Pensamiento analítico
Orientación a resultados
Proactividad
Toma de decisiones basada en data

Actividades
Desarrollar y ejecutar estrategias de paid media alineadas a los objetivos del cliente (leads, conversiones, awareness).
Configurar y gestionar campañas en plataformas como: 
Google Ads (Search, Display, YouTube)
Meta Ads (Facebook / Instagram)
TikTok Ads (según la cuenta)
Definir segmentación de audiencias, keywords y estructuras de campaña.
Administrar y optimizar presupuestos para maximizar resultados (ROAS, CPA, CPL).
Monitorear el desempeño de campañas de forma diaria/semanal.
Realizar optimizaciones continuas en: 
Copies
Creatividades
Segmentación
Pujas
Analizar métricas clave como: 
CTR
CPC
CPA
ROAS
Conversion rate
Generar reportes de resultados con insights y recomendaciones accionables.
Presentar resultados y estrategias a clientes.
Coordinar con equipos internos: 
Content (copies y mensajes)
Diseño (creativos)
Cuentas (seguimiento con cliente)
Implementar y validar tracking de conversiones (Google Tag Manager, píxeles, GA4).
Realizar pruebas A/B para optimizar campañas y creativos.
Identificar oportunidades de mejora y escalabilidad en campañas.
Mantenerse actualizado en tendencias, herramientas y cambios en plataformas de paid media.

Habilidades
Liderazgo
Trabajo en equipo
Comunicación
Resolución de problemas
Servicio al cliente
Enfoque en resultados

We value the ability to build solid relationships with the media, creativity in brand positioning, the capacity to generate persuasive content and the ability to manage our clients' reputation effectively. 

Tell us about your passion, and you could become part of the talent pool we have at the agency.  

You need: 
- Desire to develop in the communications industry.
- Identify with the another's values. (Sincerity, Passion, Innovation, Curious, Expertise, Speed).

Requirements
- Students recently graduated or who are about to complete their studies.
- Time availability (9 - 6)
- Service attitude.
- Eager to learn and develop skills and knowledge in an integral communication agency.
- English: Advanced

source_jobs.title: Trainee Program
source_jobs.description:
OUR JOB IS TO REVOLUTIONIZE THE STRATEGIC COMMUNICATION 

Join Our Trainee Program!  

We are another.co, a global communications agency founded in 2004. we have been transforming the way things are done. Revolution is in our DNA, and it guides every project we undertake.

We are currently looking talent as Trainee to collaborate on exciting and diverse projects within our areas of expertise. We value the ability to build solid relationships with the media, creativity in brand positioning, the capacity to generate persuasive content and the ability to manage our clients' reputation effectively. 

Tell us about your passion, and you could become part of the talent pool we have at the agency.  

You need: 
- Desire to develop in the communications industry.
- Identify with the another's values. (Sincerity, Passion, Innovation, Curious, Expertise, Speed).

Requirements
- Students recently graduated or who are about to complete their studies.
- Time availability (9 - 6)
- Service attitude.
- Eager to learn and develop skills and knowledge in an integral communication agency.
- English: Advanced


We are Looking For: 
Trainee

-Current College junior level pursuing Bachelor’s degree in Journalism, Communications, Public Relations, Marketing or any other related.
-Demonstrated interest in developing a successful career in an strategic communications agency.
-Demostrated strong analytical skills; strategic thinking skills; proactivity and enthusiasm for work in a fast moving, dynamic environment.
-Strong ability to communicate effectively, especially as part of a team.
-Strong ability to be creative.
- Demonstrate consumer empathy.
-English Intermediate level. 
-Spanish proficiency level (Native or C1 up) it's a plus. 
-Availability to work immediately in within a full-time basis model.

notes: another.co is a global communications agency with a diverse range of job postings, but no explicit tech roles.
